data.content:
Here's the summary of the migration and all breaking changes identified:

---

### Changes made

**`WebApi.csproj`** — TFM `net8.0` → `net9.0`, added missing `<ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>`

**`Program.cs`** — two breaking changes fixed:

| # | Breaking Change | Symptom | Fix Applied |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **`ConfigureHttpMessageHandlerBuilder` removed** in .NET 9 (was `[Obsolete]` in .NET 8) | Compile error `CS0619` | Replaced with `ConfigurePrimaryHttpMessageHandler(() => new HttpClientHandler { UseCookies = false })` |
| 2 | **IHttpClientFactory now redacts all header values** in logs by default | Trace-level logging no longer shows header values — breaks HTTP header debugging workflow | Added `.RedactLoggedHeaders(_ => false)` to opt out of redaction |

### Additional note: `dotnet watch` behavior change

In .NET 9, `dotnet watch` **no longer auto-restarts** on "rude edits" (changes that can't be hot-reloaded). It will report the edit and wait. Press **Ctrl+R** to manually restart, or set `DOTNET_WATCH_RESTART_ON_RUDE_EDIT=true`.
